about_description: Deck Shelves 为您的 Steam Deck 主页添加自定义游戏书架。通过收藏集、库区域或自定义筛选器创建书架，并直接从快速访问菜单进行管理。
about_feature_advanced_groups: 使用AND/OR和嵌套规则创建高级筛选器组
about_feature_api: 面向外部集成的公共插件API
about_feature_atomic_settings: 带备份的原子设置写入，防止数据损坏
about_feature_ci_tests: 改进的CI和测试覆盖率（Vitest + pytest）
about_feature_compat: 在游戏卡片上显示Steam Deck兼容性徽章
about_feature_developer_filter: 开发者/发行商筛选器（自动批量发现）
about_feature_duplicate: 复制书架以快速创建变体
about_feature_dynamic_sizing: 动态卡片尺寸，匹配CSS Loader主题的原生卡片大小
about_feature_edit_smart: 编辑智能货架：覆盖排序、添加过滤器、调整视觉
about_feature_external_imports: 从TabMaster或其他提供者插件导入库标签页并转换为书架
about_feature_filters: 按名称、游玩时间、安装状态、兼容性、可见性等进行筛选
about_feature_first_run: 带默认书架模板的首次运行横幅
about_feature_global_toggles: 全局切换原生尺寸和突出显示，可按书架单独覆盖
about_feature_hero_global: QAM「视觉」区域中的全局英雄开关 — 一次性为所有货架启用英雄图
about_feature_hero_per_shelf: 每个货架的英雄背景图 — 普通或智能 — 在编辑货架对话框的「视觉」选项卡中切换
about_feature_hide_recents: 隐藏最近游戏部分并可选显示背景画作
about_feature_highlight_first: 将第一个游戏突出显示为横向卡片
about_feature_import_export: 以JSON文件形式导入和导出书架配置
about_feature_manual_base_sort: 手动排序：为未放置的游戏选择基础排序（游戏时间、发行日期…）
about_feature_mouse_hover: 鼠标悬停支持：标签和亮度在悬停时激活
about_feature_new_filters: 新筛选选项：游玩时间范围、regex名称匹配、商店标签、成就
about_feature_new_sorts: 额外排序选项：游玩时间、发行日期、容量、评价分数
about_feature_online_cloud_play: 在线货架的云游戏子开关 (全局 + 单货架) — 让仅云端的目录条目 (例如通过 Unifideck 的 Xbox 云游戏) 在愿望单 / 商店促销货架上保持可见
about_feature_online_shelves: 在线货架: 将你的 Steam 愿望单和当前商店促销作为实时货架显示在主页
about_feature_playtime: 在聚焦的游戏卡片上显示总游玩时间
about_feature_refresh: 全局书架刷新发射器，减少逐架轮询，提升性能
about_feature_reorder: 通过拖放重新排列书架
about_feature_saved_filters: 保存和重复使用筛选器组合
about_feature_screenshot_automation: 截图自动化支持i18n语言切换和CDP可达性检查
about_feature_shelves: 在主页添加无限数量的自定义书架
about_feature_smart_shelves: 智能书架：12个启发式模板，根据游戏库自动显示和隐藏
about_feature_sort: 按字母顺序或最近游玩排序游戏
about_feature_sources: 通过收藏集、库区域或高级筛选器填充书架
about_feature_suspend_resume: SteamOS挂起/恢复钩子，暂停计时器并在恢复时重新验证状态
about_feature_templates: 书架模板（收藏夹、最近游玩、已安装、最常游玩）
about_feature_unifideck: UnifiDeck集成：将非Steam应用作为书架来源
about_feature_visibility: 无需删除即可单独显示或隐藏书架
about_howto_step1: 打开快速访问菜单（...按钮），在插件列表中找到Deck Shelves。
about_howto_step2: 开启主开关以在主页启用书架。
about_howto_step3: 点击+按钮创建新书架。选择名称、来源（收藏集、库区域或筛选器），并设置游戏数量上限。
about_howto_step4: 使用每个书架上的⋯按钮来编辑、复制、重新排序、显示/隐藏或删除书架。
about_howto_step5: 使用导入/导出功能来备份或分享您的书架配置。
about_learn_more_description: 在 GitHub 上访问项目或报告问题 / 请求功能。
about_limitation_deck_only: 此插件仅适用于Steam Deck的游戏模式。
about_limitation_home: 书架被注入到主页中，可能会受到Steam客户端更新的影响。
about_report_issue: 报告问题 / 请求功能
about_support_description: 如果您喜欢这个插件，请考虑支持持续开发：
composite_combine_desc: Pick how the multiple sources combine into one shelf. Union shows everything from any source; Intersection shows only games present in every source.
decoration_image_pick_hint: Choose an image from this device
decoration_intro: Add decorative cards, placeholders, or focusable shortcuts at fixed slots of this shelf.
docs_filter_achievements_desc: 按成就数量或完成度筛选。需要兼容插件。
docs_filter_app_status_desc: Show only games with a specific app status: actively downloading or applying an update, update queued or paused, initial install in progress, or currently running.
docs_filter_appidlist_desc: 定义一个明确的 Steam App ID 列表。只有这些游戏会显示在书架中。
docs_filter_collection_desc: 显示属于特定Steam收藏集的游戏。
docs_filter_compat_desc: 按Steam Deck兼容等级筛选：已验证、可游玩、不支持或未知。
docs_filter_controller_support_desc: 按手柄支持级别筛选（部分 / 完整）。
docs_filter_developer_desc: 显示由特定工作室开发的游戏。选项会自动从您的游戏库中发现。
docs_filter_discount_desc: 所选范围内的 Steam 商店折扣百分比。需要联网功能。
docs_filter_favorites_desc: 仅显示在Steam库中标记为收藏的游戏。
docs_filter_friends_desc: 显示好友玩过的游戏。需要用于好友数据的兼容插件。
docs_filter_friends_played_recently_desc: Steam 好友在最近 N 天（1-30，默认 14）内游玩过的游戏。需要联网功能。
docs_filter_friends_playing_now_desc: Steam 好友当前正在游玩的游戏。需要联网功能。
docs_filter_hidden_desc: 按可见性筛选：显示全部、仅隐藏或排除隐藏游戏。
docs_filter_installed_desc: 仅显示当前安装在此设备上的游戏。
docs_filter_is_new_desc: 匹配最近 14 天内添加到库中的游戏。
docs_filter_merge_desc: 将多个子筛选器组合成具有独立AND/OR逻辑的单个嵌套组。
docs_filter_name_includes_desc: 显示名称中包含指定文本的游戏（不区分大小写）。
docs_filter_name_regex_desc: 显示名称与正则表达式模式匹配的游戏。
docs_filter_nonsteam_desc: 仅显示非Steam游戏（手动或通过其他启动器添加的快捷方式）。
docs_filter_played_within_desc: 显示最近N天内游玩过的游戏。
docs_filter_playtime_range_desc: 显示总游玩时间在最小值和最大值之间的游戏（以分钟为单位）。
docs_filter_publisher_desc: 显示由特定发行商发布的游戏。选项会自动从您的游戏库中发现。
docs_filter_shortcut_type_desc: 按条目类型筛选：游戏（Steam游戏）、软件（Steam应用程序）、工具（Proton、运行库、可再发行组件）或非Steam链接（在Steam外部添加的快捷方式）。
docs_filter_store_tag_desc: 按Steam商店标签筛选（如RPG、独立游戏、动作）。需要来自Steam的标签数据。
docs_filter_update_pending_desc: 仅显示有待更新或下载的游戏。
docs_filters_and_or_tip: 当所有条件都必须满足时使用AND（例如：已安装 + Deck認证）。当任意条件满足即可时使用OR（例如：某个开发者或另一个）。
docs_filters_groups_desc: 筛选器可以使用AND（全部匹配）或OR（任一匹配）逻辑进行组合。您还可以反转单个筛选器以排除匹配项，以及使用合并筛选器嵌套组来构建复杂查询。
docs_filters_intro: 使用筛选器来源时，您可以组合多个条件来缩小显示的游戏范围。可用的筛选选项：
docs_filters_invert_tip: 大多数过滤器可以反转 — 与AND结合使用来排除特定子集，例如：已安装但未隐藏的游戏。
docs_filters_pending_note: 商店标签、好友和成就过滤器已正确保存和导出，但尚未在运行时评估 — 仅使用这些过滤器的书架将显示所有游戏库游戏。
docs_filters_sort_body: 游戏可以按名称字母顺序或最近游玩排序。
docs_filters_sort_tab_note: 排序对基于标签的书架（收藏夹、最近游玩、已安装）无效 — 这些书架的顺序直接来自Steam。
docs_howto_note_smart: 智能书架根据您的游戏库自动显示和隐藏。在QAM的智能书架部分启用它们。
docs_howto_note_footer: 需要更多帮助？使用快速搜索覆盖层 (L1+R1) 直接跳转到您货架上的任何游戏，或从 QAM 中的齿轮图标打开专用设置页面，集中管理配置文件、集成和备份。
docs_howto_tip: 从模板开始 — 它会自动设置来源和排序。创建后可以重命名并调整所有设置。
docs_online_body: Opt-in online features extend Deck Shelves with data from the Steam Store: your wishlist, currently discounted titles, and price/discount sorts. All requests are demand-driven (never polled) and cached locally so the home shelves keep working offline.
docs_online_discount_badge_body: Cards in online shelves show a green badge (e.g. "75% off") in the same slot as the NEW badge whenever the price cache reports a non-zero discount. Also rendered on placeholder cards so the badge is visible even when artwork is still loading.
docs_online_enable_body: Open the QAM, expand the new "Additional features" section and turn on "Online features". A privacy banner appears on first enable listing every URL contacted and what's sent — no personal data beyond the public Steam ID. Sub-toggles for Wishlist, Price/Discount sort and "Exclude owned games" appear beneath.
docs_online_exclude_body: Per-shelf toggle on wishlist/store sources. Hides games whose exact name matches a title in your local library — including non-Steam shortcuts that share a name with a Steam Store entry but use a different appid.
docs_online_privacy_note: No telemetry, no third-party domains. Requests only go to store.steampowered.com / steamcommunity.com / api.github.com (for update checks).
docs_online_refresh_body: Online shelves expose a "Refresh cache" entry in the QAM action menu, in the shelf-card context menu, and on the trailing refresh card. Clears the wishlist / store / price / name caches and re-resolves the shelf. Random and smart shelves get an equivalent "Refresh" action that re-shuffles the source without touching caches.
docs_online_refresh_tip: Card art for some newly-released games sometimes lacks the standard library_600x900 portrait. The fallback chain tries every common CDN variant (library_600x900_2x, capsule_*, header.jpg) before showing a placeholder — and the placeholder still renders the discount badge.
docs_online_sort_original_price_high_des: highest original price first (best deal value)
docs_online_source_store_desc: specials + free + popular pages of the Steam Store; cached 6 h
docs_online_source_wishlist_desc: your Steam Store wishlist; cached 24 h
docs_online_template_free_now_desc: any Steam Store game temporarily free — wishlist not required
docs_online_template_wishlist_on_sale_de: wishlisted games with 1–99% discount, sorted by discount
docs_overview_footer_explore: 上面的每个选项卡都深入介绍了某个具体方面 — 打开「货架」查看模板和管理,「筛选器」查看完整类型列表,「智能货架」查看每个启发式模式,或「排序」查看排序选项。
docs_overview_footer_support_hint: 项目链接、版本信息、已知限制以及如何支持开发都在「支持」选项卡中。
docs_shelves_child_filter_tip: 使用“收藏夹”或“标签”来源时，编辑器中会出现“附加筛选器”选项卡，使用与“筛选器”选项卡相同的筛选选项进一步缩小结果范围。
docs_shelves_decoration_body: Pin fixed-slot cards inside a shelf row: a text label, an image banner, a focusable URL shortcut, or a transparent gap that focus skips over. Each card is added at the slot you focused in the preview; the shelf auto-switches to manual sort so you can drag the card around later.
docs_shelves_decoration_tip: Text and image are mutually exclusive. A link only attaches when the card has text or an image — pure gaps stay non-focusable.
docs_shelves_display_options_body: 每个书架编辑器的“显示”选项卡允许：按确切名称去重条目（Steam优先于非Steam）、手动从书架中排除特定游戏，以及逐个书架切换卡片徽章、状态栏、游戏名称、书架标题和尾部卡片的可见性。
docs_shelves_intro: 书架是显示在Steam Deck主页上的可自定义游戏行。每个书架从您选择的来源获取游戏。
docs_shelves_manage_body: 使用每个书架上的操作菜单（⋯）来编辑、复制、重新排序、显示/隐藏或删除。您还可以将完整的书架配置以JSON文件形式导入和导出。
docs_shelves_multi_source_body: 货架可以堆叠多个来源。选择一个主来源(收藏、标签、愿望单、商店、过滤器),然后点击“添加来源”添加更多。两个或更多来源在保存时合并为复合 — 并集显示任一来源中的游戏;交集显示所有来源中的游戏。
docs_shelves_multi_source_tip: 不能在同一货架上堆叠两个相同的来源(例如,收藏 A + 收藏 A)。一旦收藏、标签、愿望单或商店在使用中,它就从选择器中消失。过滤器与其他类型互斥 — 使用过滤器“merge”进行多条件谓词。
docs_shelves_quickactions_body: Y on any card toggles the per-card highlight. Every card menu (DS shelves and native library) carries "Add to shelf" — the list only shows shelves that still have room and don't already contain the game (per-shelf limit + 50-card cap).
docs_shelves_source_collection: 显示您创建的Steam收藏集中的游戏。
docs_shelves_source_filter: 显示匹配自定义筛选条件的游戏。
docs_shelves_source_tab: 显示库区域（如最近游玩、收藏夹）中的游戏。
docs_shelves_template_tip: 所有模板都创建完全可编辑的书架 — 来源、排序、数量限制和显示选项均可在创建后更改。
docs_smart_day_overrides: 智能过滤器选项卡中的开关。开启后会出现覆盖设置选项卡，可为特定星期几设置自己的时间范围 — 仅对这些天覆盖默认时间。
docs_smart_filters_overview: 智能筛选选项卡集中所选模式的所有特定设置:微调滑块、含一个或多个小时段的显示窗口和星期几。来源选项卡保留基础项(标题、排序、上限、刷新间隔)。
docs_smart_param_lookback: 时间窗口启发式回看的范围(最近玩过:天;重温:月;遗忘:年)。
docs_smart_param_min_deck_level: 候选游戏需达到的最低 Steam Deck 兼容性级别。'任意'跳过筛选;'仅已认证'只保留绿色标识的游戏。
docs_smart_param_playtime: 最大/最小游戏时长阈值。各模板默认值合理(例如 Quick Play 上限 120 分钟);按你的习惯调整。
docs_smart_params_overview: 每个智能架在智能筛选选项卡都暴露了几个旋钮。无需切换模板即可调整启发式。
docs_smart_refresh_interval: 架子重新计算候选的频率。默认 60 分钟;提高更稳定,降低则轮换更新鲜。
docs_smart_shelves_enable: 在QAM中启用智能书架以添加它们。每个模板有不同的启发式算法。
docs_smart_shelves_hide_tip: 如果某个书架很少与您的游戏库匹配，建议隐藏而非删除 — 稍后可以重新启用而不失去其位置。
docs_smart_shelves_intro: 智能书架从您的游戏库自动生成。当游戏符合条件时显示，没有符合条件的游戏时消失。
docs_smart_sort_almost_finished: Sort: achievement % (high to low). Best-effort — fills as Steam data caches.
docs_smart_sort_backlog_rescue: Sort: weighted (playtime + staleness + Deck level), with 14-day cooldown.
docs_smart_sort_coop_ready: Sort: last session. Best-effort — depends on Steam category cache.
docs_smart_sort_couch_gaming: Sort: last session. Best-effort — depends on Steam category cache.
docs_smart_sort_daily_pick: 排序：按日期确定（每日变化）
docs_smart_sort_deck_picks: 排序：最后游玩（最近优先）
docs_smart_sort_forgotten: 排序：入库日期（最旧优先）
docs_smart_sort_forgotten_gems: Sort: review %, then metacritic, then acquisition date.
docs_smart_sort_friends_playing: Sort: currently in-game first, then by your last session. Online-gated.
docs_smart_sort_interrupted: 排序：最后游玩（最近优先）
docs_smart_sort_long_session: 排序：总游戏时间（最多优先）
docs_smart_sort_long_session_night: Sort: total playtime (high to low). Visible 19h–23h by default.
docs_smart_sort_low_battery_mode: Sort: when battery low → smallest first; otherwise Deck level + last session.
docs_smart_sort_monthly_spotlight: Sort: round-robin over installed games; advances once per 30 days.
docs_smart_sort_non_steam: 排序：最后游玩（最近优先）
docs_smart_sort_not_started: 排序：入库日期（最旧优先）
docs_smart_sort_on_deck: 排序：最后游玩（最近优先）
docs_smart_sort_party_games: Sort: last session. Best-effort — depends on Steam category cache.
docs_smart_sort_quick_play: 排序：最后游玩（最近优先）
docs_smart_sort_random_pick: 排序：随机（每 24 小时刷新）
docs_smart_sort_recently_played: 排序：最后游玩（最近优先）
docs_smart_sort_rediscover: 排序：距上次游玩时长（最长优先）
docs_smart_sort_seasonal_rotation: Sort: round-robin over installed games; advances once per 90 days.
docs_smart_sort_short_battery: Sort: Deck level, then last session.
docs_smart_sort_spare_time: 排序：按字母（仅在短时段显示）
docs_smart_sort_weekly_rotation: Sort: round-robin over installed games; advances once per week.
docs_smart_surprise_me: 给我惊喜：系统每天自动选择1–5个智能书架。您可以设置确切数量，或保持0让系统决定。
docs_smart_template_almost_finished: Games with achievement progress ≥ threshold (default 70%) — close to completion. Best-effort: depends on Steam achievements being cached for your library; first paint may be partial.
docs_smart_template_backlog_rescue: Installed games with some playtime that you haven't touched in 30+ days. Rotates with a 14-day cooldown so the same game doesn't keep resurfacing.
docs_smart_template_best_unplayed: 您从未玩过的已安装游戏。
docs_smart_template_coop_ready: Games tagged with Co-op or Online Co-op. Best-effort: depends on Steam store categories being cached for each app.
docs_smart_template_couch_gaming: Games tagged with Shared/Split Screen multi-player. Best-effort: depends on Steam store categories being cached for each app.
docs_smart_template_daily_pick: 每天不同的游戏选择 — 基于日期的确定性选择。
docs_smart_template_deck_picks: 库中的Deck Verified游戏，按最近游玩排序。
docs_smart_template_forgotten: 在库中超过3年且从未启动过的Steam游戏 — 按购入时间从最旧到最新排序。
docs_smart_template_forgotten_gems: Owned games you've never played that have high review percentage or metacritic score. Ranked by review score, then metacritic, then acquisition recency.
docs_smart_template_friends_playing: Games your Steam friends are playing right now (or, optionally, played in the last 14 days). Online-gated: only shows when Online features are enabled. Returns empty when no friend has matching activity yet.
docs_smart_template_hidden_gems: Owned games with high review percentage (≥85%) that you've never played — overlooked titles in your library.
docs_smart_template_interrupted: 游玩时间在30分钟至3小时之间的游戏 — 开始了但没继续。
docs_smart_template_long_session: 游玩时间超过3小时的已安装游戏 — 您投入的游戏。
docs_smart_template_long_session_night: Installed games with over 3 hours of playtime, surfaced only between 19h and 23h — committed titles for evening sessions.
docs_smart_template_low_battery_mode: Lightweight Deck-friendly games. When the deck is on battery below the threshold, surfaces the smallest + shortest-playtime titles first. On AC / unknown battery, behaves like Short battery session.
docs_smart_template_monthly_spotlight: Round-robin slice over your installed games, advancing once per 30 days. Long-running spotlight rotation.
docs_smart_template_never_touched_classi: Steam games acquired 3+ years ago that you've never launched. Surfaces oldest acquisitions first.
docs_smart_template_non_steam: 非Steam快捷方式和模拟器条目，按最近游玩排序。
docs_smart_template_not_started: 从未启动过的零游戏时间Steam游戏。
docs_smart_template_on_deck: 已安装的Deck Verified或Playable游戏，按最近游玩排序。
docs_smart_template_party_games: Games tagged with Local Multi-Player / Local PvP. Best-effort: depends on Steam store categories being cached for each app.
docs_smart_template_quick_play: 游玩时间不足2小时的已安装Deck兼容游戏。
docs_smart_template_random_pick: 从整个游戏库随机选择 — 排序每24小时刷新一次。
docs_smart_template_recent_hidden_instal: Installed in the last 30 days but never launched — catches recent acquisitions that fell through the cracks.
docs_smart_template_recently_played: 您在过去30天内玩过的游戏。
docs_smart_template_rediscover: 超过6个月未碰的已游玩1小时以上的Deck兼容游戏。
docs_smart_template_seasonal_rotation: Round-robin slice over your installed games, advancing once per 90 days (one season). Slow, deliberate rotation for long-term curation.
docs_smart_template_short_battery: Installed Deck-friendly games small in install size (≤4 GB) and short in playtime (≤2 hours) — quick play that won't drain the battery.
docs_smart_template_spare_time: 游戏时间≤2小时的已安装游戏，在短时游戏窗口期显示：6–9时、12–14时和19–22时。窗口期外隐藏。
docs_smart_template_time_of_day: 按时间段变化：早上快速游玩，下午Deck精选，晚上重新发现。
docs_smart_template_travel_mode: Installed Deck-friendly games that fit in modest storage (≤5 GB). Useful when packing a microSD for a trip.
docs_smart_template_weekly_rotation: Round-robin slice over your installed games, advancing once per week. Same slice all week, then rotates to the next batch.
docs_smart_time_of_day_rotation: 时段架自动切换内容:上午 (05–12) Quick Play,下午 (12–18) Deck Picks,晚间/夜间 (18–05) 重温。架本身全天可见;只有游戏会变。
docs_smart_visibility_days: 选择架子可见的星期。全选 = 无限制。空 = 永不显示。
docs_smart_visibility_per_day: 每个时间范围还可以指定其适用的星期几——独立于书架级别的日期筛选器。没有日期限制的范围遵循书架级别的日期设置。
docs_smart_visibility_window: 选择一个或多个时间段,并可选地限定特定星期几。窗口之外该架将从主页消失。空闲时间架会预填其内置时间段;时段模式以只读方式展示其内部内容轮换边界。
docs_sort_added_desc: 按添加到库的时间排序（最新的排在前面）。
docs_sort_alpha_desc: 按显示名称的字母顺序排列游戏。
docs_sort_direction_body: 每种排序默认为降序(最新/最大/最高优先)。每个货架可以独立将排序翻转为升序,而无需更改来源。
docs_sort_direction_tip: 使用排序下拉菜单旁边的图标按钮在降序(默认)和升序之间切换 — 适用于除手动和随机之外的所有排序。
docs_sort_metacritic_desc: 按Metacritic评分排序（最高的排在前面）。
docs_sort_multikey_body: 示例:“折扣 %”+“Metacritic”首先按最大折扣排序;具有相同折扣的游戏回退到 metacritic 分数。链条是稳定的:次要键仅在主键真正打平时才起作用。手动和随机只能作为单一的主键。
docs_sort_multikey_tip: 点击“添加次要排序”链接平局决胜键。第一个键决定顺序;后续键在主值相等时打破平局。每行有自己的升序/降序切换。
docs_sort_multikey_title: 多键排序(主键 + 平局决胜)
docs_sort_playtime_desc: 按总游玩时间排序（最多的排在前面）。
docs_sort_recent_desc: 按最近游玩排序（最近的排在前面）。
docs_sort_release_date_desc: 按发行日期排序（最新的排在前面）。
docs_sort_review_desc: 按Steam用户评价分数排序（最高的排在前面）。
docs_sort_size_desc: 按磁盘安装大小排序（最大的排在前面）。
docs_template_awaiting_update: 有待更新或下载的游戏。
docs_template_blank: 空书架 — 打开编辑表单从头配置。
docs_template_deck_verified: 带有 Deck Verified 标签的游戏 — Valve 确认在 Steam Deck 上运行良好。
docs_template_favorites: Steam 库中标记为收藏的游戏。
docs_template_installed: 当前安装在设备上的所有游戏。
docs_template_long_session: 游戏时间超过 3 小时的已安装游戏 — 您的重点游戏。
docs_template_most_played: 按总游戏时间排序的最常玩游戏。
docs_template_non_steam: 库中的非 Steam 游戏和模拟器快捷方式。
docs_template_recent: 最近玩过的游戏，按最后一次游戏排序。
docs_template_recently_added: 最近添加到 Steam 库的游戏。
docs_template_steam_cloud: 支持 Steam 云存档的游戏 — 存档在多设备间同步。
docs_template_top_reviewed: Steam 用户评价最高的已安装游戏。
filter_achievements_info: 按成就筛选（需要兼容插件）
filter_finish_before_adding: 请先完成当前筛选器再添加新的
filter_friends_info: 显示好友玩过的游戏（需要兼容插件）
filter_friends_played_recently_info: 包含至少一位 Steam 好友在该时段内游玩过的游戏，含当前正在游玩。需要联网功能。
filter_friends_playing_now_info: 包含至少一位 Steam 好友当前正在游玩的游戏。需要联网功能。
filter_publisher_empty: Steam Big Picture API 不提供发行商数据；此筛选器不会匹配任何游戏。
first_run_desc: 在主页上创建自定义游戏书架。使用默认设置开始，或手动添加书架。
force_themes_label: 强制使用 CSS Loader 主题 (实验性)
global_hero_enabled: 在所有书架上显示背景美术
hide_owned_non_steam: 包含非 Steam 快捷方式
import_from_tabmaster_desc: 导入您的TabMaster库标签页并将其转换为书架。
mount_crash_banner_desc: 检测到货架渲染错误。它们已在主页上暂时隐藏，但你仍可继续创建和编辑 — 重置后会再次显示。
mount_crash_warning: 主页书架已禁用 — 检测到挂载错误。
online_features_desc: 允许书架使用Steam商店数据（愿望单、价格）。仅联系以下列出的URL。
online_privacy_body: Deck Shelves 将连接到Steam商店获取您的愿望单和游戏价格——这些是Steam已经使用的数据。不会共享新信息，也不会发送账户凭据。您可以随时关闭此功能。
online_privacy_item_ping: 连接检查 — 仅在获取商店数据前
online_privacy_item_price: 游戏价格 — 缓存6小时，仅在需要时获取
online_privacy_item_wishlist: 愿望单 — 每天同步一次
preview_empty: 没有匹配此配置的游戏
recents_replace_error_desc: 实验性替换因错误被停用，已回退到隐藏模式。
recents_replace_source: 将货架用作最近游玩（实验性）
reset_all_confirm_desc: 这将永久删除 Deck Shelves 的所有货架、设置和缓存。无法撤销。
reset_shelves_confirm_desc: 要删除所有书架吗？此操作无法撤消。
reset_smart_shelves_confirm_desc: 要删除所有智能书架并禁用智能功能吗？此操作无法撤消。
shelf_hero_background: 显示第一个书架的背景画作
smart_allow_day_overrides_desc: 为特定星期几设置不同的时间范围
smart_composite_desc: Mix multiple smart modes into one shelf. Union = any mode matches. Intersection = all modes match.
smart_first_run_desc: 智能书架根据您的游戏库自动显示。当没有符合条件的游戏时会自动消失。
smart_refresh_interval_desc: 此书架的重新计算频率（分钟）。默认: 60 分钟。
smart_template_custom_desc: 从头开始构建您自己的智能架 — 手动设置筛选条件和排序。
smart_template_picker_desc: 智能书架自动显示 — 无需配置。
smart_visible_days_empty_warning: 未选择任何天 — 书架将不会显示
smart_visible_hours_desc: 启用后,此架只在下面的时间窗口内显示。
sort_chain_desc: Earlier rows are the primary order; later rows break ties. Each row has its own asc/desc toggle.
source_store_hint: 浏览Steam商店的游戏。可应用折扣等筛选器缩小范围。需要在线功能。
source_wishlist_hint: 您的Steam愿望单——您想购买的游戏。需要启用在线功能。
title: 名称
toast_failed_import: 无法导入自定义标签页
view_more_wishlist:
查看更多
在愿望单
settings_backup_shelves_desc: Export or import only your regular shelves (not smart shelves).
settings_backup_smart_desc: Export or import smart shelf definitions + the surprise-me flag.
settings_backup_all_desc: Export or import every setting, toggle, and saved filter.
settings_advanced_reset_desc: Delete shelves, smart shelves, or every setting. A confirmation modal asks before anything is removed.
settings_advanced_logs_desc: Last 50 plugin events — errors, warnings, and informational entries. Cleared on plugin reload.
settings_profiles_save_desc: Capture every setting + shelf list into a named profile you can restore later.
settings_profiles_list_desc: Apply a profile to swap all settings + shelves to its snapshot. Duplicate to fork, rename to relabel, delete to remove.
settings_profiles_active_desc: The "{{name}}" profile is currently applied. Detaching keeps all your current settings but unties them from any saved profile.
settings_profiles_apply_confirm_message: This replaces every current setting and your shelf list with the profile snapshot. Profiles themselves are preserved.
settings_profiles_delete_confirm_message: The profile snapshot will be removed. This does not affect current settings or shelves.
about_kofi_qr_hint: Scan the QR with your phone, or click Ko-fi to open the page in a browser.
profile_save_description: Captures every setting, every shelf, and every saved filter into a named snapshot you can restore later.
profile_save_name_taken: A profile with that name already exists.
settings_profiles_io_desc: Move profiles between devices or back them up. Files land in your Downloads folder by default.
binding_help: Customize the button combos that trigger Deck Shelves actions. Reserved buttons (A / B / Menu / Steam / ...) cannot be bound — even in chord. Disable a binding entirely with “Disable” where allowed.
binding_card_quick_launch: 快速启动（安装 / 游玩 / 继续 / 卸载 / 暂停）
about_feature_settings_page: Dedicated Settings page with a two-pane shell — left pane mirrors every QAM toggle; right pane opens 7 detail cards (Quick settings, Shelves, Profiles, Integrations, Shortcuts, Backup, Advanced tools).
about_feature_profiles: Usage profiles — save your entire setup (every toggle, shelf, and filter) as a named profile, switch between them in one tap, import / export to JSON, and keep a read-only "Default" entry that resets to factory.
about_feature_button_bindings: Customizable button shortcuts — remap or disable the gamepad triggers for hide / highlight / quick-launch on cards; remap (but not disable) the chords for Quick Search and Side Navigation. Single, chord (e.g. L1+R1), and double-tap (e.g. L1+L1) all supported.
about_feature_unified_list: Unified shelf list — opt in to merge regular and smart shelves into a single ordered list. Drag-and-drop or ↑ / ↓ buttons reorder; the home reflects your custom order.
about_feature_drag_reorder: HTML5 drag-and-drop reordering in the Shelves detail panel (unified mode), with a ⋮⋮ handle and visual feedback during the drag. Gamepad-friendly ↑ / ↓ buttons stay as a fallback.
about_feature_light_mode: Light mode — hides advanced toggles and sliders in the QAM / sidecar (CSS Loader force, smart-shelves-at-bottom, surprise-me, four global visual sliders) to keep the panel uncluttered for users who never touch them.
about_feature_external_launchers: External launcher discovery — EmuDeck, RetroDECK, Heroic (Epic / GOG / Amazon), Lutris, Moonlight, and Chiaki games surface through dedicated shelf sources. Read-only, runs in the background, refreshes every 15 minutes.
about_feature_integrations_toggle: Integrations panel — every registered descriptor (built-in or third-party) gets a per-row enable / disable toggle. Flip off the ones you don't need.
about_feature_built_in_chip: BUILT-IN chip — first-party Deck Shelves entries get a green tag in the Integrations card so you can tell them apart from third-party plugin contributions.
about_feature_filter_v3: 32 new built-in filters — genres, categories, franchise, VR support, multiplayer type, family sharing, DLC owned, soundtrack owned, launch count, average session length, never completed, recently abandoned, installed but never played, played only once, achievement percentage range, storage device, installed size, compat data quality, six external-launcher heuristics, executable type, launch option tags, custom tags, parser categories, hidden launcher shortcuts, and three composite modes (weighted, priority, exclusion group).
about_feature_sort_v3: 25 new built-in sorts — most / least launched, longest / shortest session, most ignored, rediscovered recently, completion %, closest to completion, rarest achievements, newest / oldest installed, oldest unplayed, newest purchased, largest / smallest install, SSD / SD priority, friends playing now, most friends owning, trending among friends, and five randomisation variants.
about_feature_source_v3: 19 new built-in shelf sources — dynamic Steam collections, followed, ignored, DLC, soundtrack, pinned, history, session queue, temporary queue, recently updated (last 14 days), with events, with workshop updates, controller-specific, and six external-launcher collections.
about_feature_grip_buttons: 通过原始控制器流将后握/摇杆点击（L3、R3、L4、L5、R4、R5）映射到卡片快捷键
about_feature_composite_shelves: 通过并集（任一）或交集（全部）模式将多个来源合并到一个复合书架
about_feature_asset_refresh: 自定义美术（胶囊、徽标、Hero、图标）在返回主页的瞬间刷新 — 无需重载插件
settings_export_pick_desc: 选择要包含在导出中的部分。
settings_import_pick_desc: 选择要从此文件应用的部分。
settings_reset_pick_desc: 选择要重置为出厂默认值的部分。
settings_backup_custom_desc: 选择要包含在导出或导入中的部分。
